_descriptions._note: This baseline is a placeholder seeded with conservative values. Regenerate it on the target machine with: pnpm perf:dashboard --output perf-baseline.json. The gate uses a 1.5x per-metric multiplier plus the existing min-delta-ms floor so small absolute changes do not flap.
_descriptions.typing.dispatch_max_ms: Worst single CM6 view.dispatch() cost during a 100-char typing burst (across cases).
_descriptions.typing.dispatch_mean_ms: Average synchronous CM6 view.dispatch() cost per inserted character.
_descriptions.typing.dispatch_p95_ms: 95th-percentile per-character CM6 dispatch cost — the canonical typing-feel metric.
_descriptions.typing.idle_ms: Time spent waiting for requestIdleCallback after the burst.
_descriptions.typing.input_to_idle_ms: wall_ms + settle_ms + idle_ms; end-to-end editor-is-done time for the burst.
_descriptions.typing.longtask_count: Browser long tasks (>=50ms main-thread blocks) observed during the burst.
_descriptions.typing.longtask_max_ms: Longest long-task observed during the burst.
_descriptions.typing.longtask_total_ms: Total wall time spent in long tasks during the burst.
_descriptions.typing.post_idle_lag_max_ms: Max frame-cadence lag in the 500ms after the editor reports idle.
_descriptions.typing.post_idle_lag_mean_ms: Mean frame-cadence lag in the 500ms after the editor reports idle.
_descriptions.typing.post_idle_lag_p95_ms: p95 frame-cadence lag in the 500ms after the editor reports idle.
_descriptions.typing.post_idle_longtask_count: Long tasks observed in the 500ms after idle (CPU still trapped after typing).
_descriptions.typing.settle_ms: Two-frame settle wait after the burst.
_descriptions.typing.wall_ms: Wall-clock time for the full 100-character burst loop.
